page.title: Simple Captain Manager Texts
page.t: 舰长管理
自动任命舰长
撤销舰长职务
解雇舰长
允许在右键交互菜单中对所选飞船的舰长进行批量人事管理。
转移未分配人员
使用研讨会
已撤销 %1 名舰长的职务。
已为 %1 艘飞船分配了舰长。
已解雇 %1 名舰长。
根据优先级自动将未分配的人员任命为舰长.
已将飞船 %1 的 %2 星级舰长 [%3] 撤职并转为未分配人员。
已解雇飞船 %1 的 %2 星级舰长 [%3]。
已为飞船 %1 分配了 %2 星级舰长 [%3]。
已将 %2 名未分配船员转移到 %1。
研讨会培训完成：提升了 %1 名舰长的技能。[消耗：基础研讨会 x%2, 1星 x%3, 2星 x%4, 3星 x%5, 4星 x%6]
[警告] 为了给飞船 %1 撤职的舰长留出空间，已自动解雇了星级最低的船员 %2星[%3]。
[警告] 未分配人员不足，未能为请求自动任命的 %2 艘飞船中的 %1 艘分配舰长。
由于 %1 空间有限，在 %3 名可用的未分配船员中仅转移了 %2 名。
[警告] 未分配人员不足，未能为飞船 %1 分配舰长。
撤销当前舰长职务，并将其转为飞船内的未分配人员。
没有可撤职的舰长。
该飞船已配有舰长。
立即解雇当前舰长。
没有可解雇的舰长。
使用玩家仓库中现有的船员研讨会来培训舰长。
没有可培训的舰长。
[警告] 银河系内没有待命的未分配船员，无法转移到 %1。
丢弃货物
已将飞船 %1 的所有货物（%2 种）丢弃到太空中。
将所有货物丢弃到太空中。
没有可丢弃的货物。
Transfers unassigned crew members to fill the ship according to priority.
Assign Captain
Use Seminars
Other Captain Functions
Assign 5-Star only
Selects and assigns only unassigned crew members with a piloting skill of 5-star to the captain slot.
Assign All Unassigned
Assign 3-Star or higher only
Assign 2-Star or higher only
Assign under 2-Star only
Assign 4-Star or higher only
Assign 1-Star or higher only
Assign under 5-Star only
Assign under 4-Star only
Assign under 3-Star only
Assign under 1-Star only
Train to Max Skill (use all seminars sequentially)
Train to 4-Star (use up to 3-star seminars)
Train to 3-Star (use up to 2-star seminars)
Use only 1 seminar (original behavior)
Train to 2-Star (use up to 1-star seminars)
Train to 1-Star (use basic seminars)
Assigns unassigned crew members in the galaxy to the captain slot, regardless of skill.
Selects and assigns only unassigned crew members with a piloting skill of 3-star or higher (skill value 9+) to the captain slot.
Selects and assigns only unassigned crew members with a piloting skill of 2-star or higher (skill value 6+) to the captain slot.
Selects and assigns only unassigned crew members with a piloting skill under 2-star (skill value under 6) to the captain slot.
Selects and assigns only unassigned crew members with a piloting skill of 4-star or higher (skill value 12+) to the captain slot.
Selects and assigns only unassigned crew members with a piloting skill of 1-star or higher (skill value 3+) to the captain slot.
Selects and assigns only unassigned crew members with a piloting skill under 5-star (skill value under 15) to the captain slot.
Selects and assigns only unassigned crew members with a piloting skill under 4-star (skill value under 12) to the captain slot.
Selects and assigns only unassigned crew members with a piloting skill under 3-star (skill value under 9) to the captain slot.
Selects and assigns only unassigned crew members with a piloting skill under 1-star (skill value under 3) to the captain slot.
Sequentially consumes all available seminars (0-4 star) in your inventory to train the captain's piloting skill to 5-star (max).
Sequentially consumes basic to 3-star seminars to train piloting skill up to 4-star. (Saves 4-star seminars)
Sequentially consumes basic to 2-star seminars to train piloting skill up to 3-star. (Saves 3 and 4-star seminars)
Consumes exactly 1 seminar appropriate for the captain's current skill to promote the piloting skill by 1 tier.
Sequentially consumes basic to 1-star seminars to train piloting skill up to 2-star. (Saves 2, 3 and 4-star seminars)
Sequentially consumes basic seminars to train piloting skill up to 1-star. (Saves 1, 2, 3 and 4-star seminars)
The target ship or station has no free space.
